title: strychnos pernitida
intro: Strychnos pernitida, also known as the poison nut or strychnine tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating rheumatism and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos pernitida include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. Strychnos pernitida can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, for topical or internal use.
